content: Vehicle: Blue Mahindra XUV700, HR-14-AB-7891. Inspection conducted on March 18, 2024. Findings: 1. Front left fender has recent dent and paint mismatch. Paint chip analysis indicates repair occurred within 48 hours. 2. Left headlight replaced with used unit (VIN: XUV700-HL-2020-08). 3. Damage to fender consistent with high-velocity impact. 4. Garage owner’s invoice dated March 16, 2024, at 23:47, for 'Headlight Replacement & Fender Repair' — payment via UPI. 5. Report states damage 'at least 14 days old' — this is incorrect. The repair was completed on March 16. The report was amended at the request of the owner. Original draft report attached as Annexure A.
